data.description: Putin has named the FSB Academy after Felix Dzerzhinsky.

data.title: IONCHI Welcomes AITO to Join Hands with BMW and Mercedes-Benz to Develop Premium High-Power Charging Networks in China
data.description: In Beijing, the high-power charging services joint venture IONCHI, involving BMW and Mercedes-Benz, welcomed SERES as an equal shareholder. AITO, the SERES Group's premium brand, will aid in the advancement of IONCHI's premium charging infrastructure through this investment. This move further enhances IONCHI's ability to offer high-quality charging services utilizing advanced technology and digital solutions to a wide range of vehicles.

data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Boston Scientific Expectations Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: Before the market opens on Wednesday, April 22, Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) will announce its first-quarter earnings. Analysts are predicting earnings of 79 cents per share, up from 75 cents per share last year. The company is expected to report quarterly revenue of $5.17 billion, an increase from $4.66 billion in the same period last year. Recently, the company revealed data from its HI-PEITHO clinical trial for the EKOS Endovascular System in pulmonary embolism patients. Boston Scientific's stock fell 2.4% to $59.52 on Tuesday. For more detailed information, including the latest analyst ratings, visit Benzinga's website.

data.title: Satoshi Nakamoto Likely To Move Their Bitcoin In 2026? Here's What The Biggest Prediction Markets Are Saying
data.description: The dormant Bitcoin holdings attributed to Satoshi Nakamoto are the subject of prediction markets, which suggest it will remain untouched until 2026. Odds of the mysterious creator moving their BTC this year are at a low 9% on Polymarket, with Kalshi bettors giving it an 8% chance. Over $2.6 million has been wagered on Polymarket regarding this outcome. The market outcome hinges on on-chain analytics firm Arkham confirming an "Outflow" or "Swaps" transaction from a Nakamoto-linked wallet. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Omantel embarks on major BSS/OSS transformation with Cerillion
data.description: A recent announcement reveals the launch of a new sovereign cloud deployment at Oman Data Park, which will play a pivotal role in Omantel's transition from a traditional telecom company to a more tech-focused entity. The initiative, unveiled on April 22, 2026 in London, will involve Cerillion (AIM: CER), a prominent provider of composable BSS/OSS solutions for telecom operators. This move signifies a significant digital transformation for Omantel and marks a crucial milestone in its strategic evolution.

data.title: Luckin Coffee's Smart Roasting Center Commences Operation
data.description: Luckin Coffee, a prominent retail coffee chain based in Qingdao, China, disclosed that it has initiated operations at its state-of-the-art smart roasting center after a significant investment of RMB 3 billion. The move is aimed at boosting the Company’s supply chain resilience. This development was announced on April 22, 2026, without specifying the source.
Rio Tinto CCO Baatar states that the U.S. is not facing any copper supply shortages.

data.title: AT&T, Tesla And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Wednesday
data.description: Stock futures in the U.S. are showing an upward trend today, with investor attention likely focused on Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) and Capital One Financial Corp. (NYSE: COF). Analysts are anticipating Tesla to announce earnings of 37 cents per share, with revenue expected to reach $22.71 billion. In after-hours trading, Tesla's stock saw a 0.7% increase, reaching $388.99. On the other hand, Capital One reported first-quarter earnings of $4.42 per share, falling short of the estimated $4.55. Their quarterly revenue also fell below expectations at $15.23 billion. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: GE Vernova Gears Up For Q1 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
data.description: GE Vernova Inc. (NYSE: GEV) is set to unveil its first-quarter earnings on Wednesday, April 22. Analysts are predicting earnings to reach $2.02 per share, a significant increase from 91 cents per share in the same period last year. Expectations for quarterly revenue stand at $9.26 billion, up from $8.03 billion in the previous year. The company recently announced a partnership with Hitachi to potentially deploy a BWRX-300 small modular reactor in Southeast Asia. Closing at $991.30 on Tuesday, GE Vernova's shares saw a modest uptick of 0.1%. For more details and the latest analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page.

data.title: onefinestay Repositions Portfolio Toward High-End Leisure Demand
data.description: Onefinestay has revealed plans to shift its global portfolio towards high-end luxury homes located in leisure destinations, while also enhancing its offerings in metropolitan markets. This strategic evolution will see a focus on elite properties tailored for luxurious experiences for guests. The company aims to refine its services by concentrating on upscale accommodations in sought-after leisure locations, in addition to further improving its presence in urban areas. This move signifies a deliberate shift in strategy for onefinestay as it aims to provide unparalleled luxury experiences for guests.

data.title: Europcar Mobility Group Announces Exclusive Partnership With MIC Co., Ltd. to Expand Presence in Japan
data.description: Europcar Mobility Group has recently announced an exclusive partnership with MIC Co., Ltd., the company behind Japan's renowned "Niconico Rent-A-Car" network. This significant agreement represents Europcar Mobility Group’s inaugural exclusive partnership in Japan, signifying a strategic move to offer cohesive mobility services to the increasing influx of global visitors to Japan. The partnership, initiated on April 10, 2026, offers enhanced booking capabilities for customers, contributing to the seamless travel experience for inbound travelers.

data.title: Advantest Introduces Pin Scale 5000B Digital Test Solution to Extend Capabilities of V93000 EXA Scale Test Platform
data.description: New testing capabilities have been developed to tackle the rising complexity of next-generation High-Performance Computing (HPC) and Artificial Intelligence (AI) devices. This advanced testing system is specifically designed to handle the intricate nature of these cutting-edge technologies. With the growing importance of HPC and AI in various industries, this testing solution offers critical support. It aims to address the challenges posed by the increasing complexity of these devices, ensuring their optimal performance and reliability. The system is equipped to handle a wide range of test scenarios to meet the demands of next-generation HPC and AI devices. This development underscores the commitment to advancing technology in the face of evolving industry requirements.
The NHTSA says Ford Motor Company is recalling 140,201 vehicles across the U.S.

data.title: C-Infinity Raises $16M to Eliminate the Manufacturing Bottleneck Between Design and Production
data.description: A tech company based in Mountain View, California, known as C-Infinity, specializing in Advanced Manufacturing, has recently secured $16 million in funding. The company has developed an AI platform that streamlines the process of converting digital designs into manufacturing plans ready for production.

data.title: SkySparc Acquires Covarius and Uniun
data.description: In Stockholm, SkySparc, a leading global provider of digital transformation solutions for finance institutions, has acquired Covarius Group Limited and Uniun Technology Limited to boost its European presence and enhance specialized support for treasury transformation. The financial details of the acquisitions were not revealed. Covarius and Uniun collaborate effectively to offer comprehensive solutions for treasury services, solidifying SkySparc's position in the market.

data.title: Experian Launches AI-Powered ‘Transaction Forensics’ to Bolster Fraud Prevention Across UK Financial Services
data.description: Experian has unveiled 'Transaction Forensics', an innovative fraud and anti-money laundering tool using AI technology in London. This solution aims to assist financial institutions in detecting and preventing complex fraud and financial crimes in real-time. By merging Resistant AI's advanced behavioral and transaction analytics with Experian's extensive consumer and commercial data, Transaction Forensics is powered by over 80 AI models. The tool is designed to provide comprehensive protection against fraudulent activities.

data.title: Candid launches GENRTR
data.description: Candid has launched GENRTR, an international Private Commerce Network giving enterprise Direct-to-Consumer brands access to 70 million shoppers. This network allows brands to offer exclusive propositions to consumers worldwide. The announcement was made in Amsterdam on April 22, 2026.
NHTSA says Ford is recalling certain U.S. vehicles over damaged wiring that could trigger a short circuit and fire in the A-pillar, raising crash and injury risks.
